visual_explanation: High-sensitivity safety net detected a defect keyword in the inspection source after the model returned PASS.
possible_causes: model uncertainty on a high-sensitivity inspection frame
visible anomaly may require human confirmation
quality-control policy prevents silent release of uncertain items
recommended_fix: inspect nearby batch items if the anomaly is confirmed
capture a clearer image and rerun inspection if needed
prevention: collect confirmed defect examples for factory-specific adaptation
improve camera lighting and product positioning
use operator feedback to tune inspection thresholds
factory_owner_summary: The frame was routed to STOP_LINE because the source indicates visible structural damage that should not be silently passed.

annotation_reason: Qwen returned an approximate 3x3 product region; this is not a true bounding box.
report:
VisionGuard inspected 118 product images this shift and detected 41 potential defects, giving a defect rate of 34.7%.

The most common defect type was "crack" and the most common defect category was "surface crack". The highest severity observed was "critical". Average Qwen-VL inference latency was 1325ms per image on AMD MI300X.

The likely recurring causes include excess pressure during molding, thermal stress during cooling, impact damage during handling. Recommended action: pause the affected line, inspect the nearby batch, and review process settings before continuing full-speed production. Prevention summary: reduce mechanical impact during transfer, calibrate temperature control, add automated inspection after cooling stage.
operations_alert:
Operations Alert:
Crack-related defects increased in the latest inspection batch.

Risk:
Critical or warning-level defects are concentrated on Line LINE-A1.

Most common likely cause:
excess pressure during molding, thermal stress during cooling, impact damage during handling.

Recommended immediate action:
inspect nearby batch items, remove this item from the production line, check molding pressure and cooling temperature.

Prevention:
reduce mechanical impact during transfer, calibrate temperature control, add automated inspection after cooling stage.
